name_policy: Personal names remain in original English.
spoiler_policy: Only information available through each current paragraph is used.

blocks.original_text: Daenerys Targaryen wed Khal Drogo with fear and barbaric splendor in a field beyond the walls of Pentos, for the Dothraki believed that all things of importance in a man’s life must be done beneath the open sky.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys怀着恐惧，在Pentos城外的露天草地与Khal Drogo成婚；Dothraki认为人生大事必须在天空下完成。
blocks.literary_note_zh: “fear and barbaric splendor”并置主观恐惧与宏大视觉：婚礼不是纯美庆典，也不是单一色调的暴力场景。
blocks.background_zh: **文本事实：** Dothraki认为人生重大事件必须露天举行，因此婚礼在Pentos城墙外举办。

blocks.original_text: Drogo had called his khalasar to attend him and they had come, forty thousand Dothraki warriors and uncounted numbers of women, children, and slaves. Outside the city walls they camped with their vast herds, raising palaces of woven grass, eating everything in sight, and making the good folk of Pentos more anxious with every passing day.
blocks.explanation_zh: Drogo召来整个khalasar，包括四万武士及无数家属和奴隶；庞大营地与畜群令Pentos居民越来越不安。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段交代婚姻的军事交易与Dothraki时间表；Viserys以dragon自称，Daenerys却在梦中开始把dragon与他分开。
blocks.background_zh: **术语：** khalasar是由khal统领的Dothraki迁徙群体，也包括家属、奴隶和畜群。

blocks.original_text: “My fellow magisters have doubled the size of the city guard,” Illyrio told them over platters of honey duck and orange snap peppers one night at the manse that had been Drogo’s. The khal had joined his khalasar, his estate given over to Daenerys and her brother until the wedding.
blocks.explanation_zh: Illyrio说Pentos已经扩充城卫；Drogo回到khalasar后，把自己的庄园暂时留给婚前的Daenerys和Viserys。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段交代婚姻的军事交易与Dothraki时间表；Viserys以dragon自称，Daenerys却在梦中开始把dragon与他分开。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: “Best we get Princess Daenerys wedded quickly before they hand half the wealth of Pentos away to sellswords and bravos,” Ser Jorah Mormont jested. The exile had offered her brother his sword the night Dany had been sold to Kbal Drogo; Viserys had accepted eagerly. Mormont had been their constant companion ever since.
blocks.explanation_zh: Ser Jorah玩笑说应尽快成婚，免得Pentos耗费巨资雇人防卫；这名流亡骑士已经向Viserys献剑效忠。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jorah的玩笑把Pentos的恐惧翻译成财政问题，而“Daenerys被卖给Drogo”直接命名了婚姻的交易属性。
blocks.background_zh: **文本事实：** Ser Jorah Mormont是流亡骑士，已经向Viserys献剑效忠。

blocks.original_text: Magister Illyrio laughed lightly through his forked beard, but Viserys did not so much as smile. “He can have her tomorrow, if he likes,” her brother said. He glanced over at Dany, and she lowered her eyes. “So long as he pays the price.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Viserys只关心Drogo何时支付政治对价；他看向Daenerys时，她只能低下眼睛。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Viserys说Drogo可以“拿走她”，在语法上把Daenerys当作对价，而非具有意志的家人。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: Illyrio waved a languid hand in the air, rings glittering on his fat fingers. “I have told you, all is settled. Trust me. The khal has promised you a crown, and you shall have it.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Illyrio保证交易已经谈妥，Drogo承诺的王冠最终会交给Viserys。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段交代婚姻的军事交易与Dothraki时间表；Viserys以dragon自称，Daenerys却在梦中开始把dragon与他分开。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: “Yes, but when?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Viserys立刻追问承诺究竟何时兑现。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段交代婚姻的军事交易与Dothraki时间表；Viserys以dragon自称，Daenerys却在梦中开始把dragon与他分开。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: “When the khal chooses,” Illyrio said. “He will have the girl first, and after they are wed he must make his procession across the plains and present her to the dosh khaleen at Vaes Dothrak. After that, perhaps. If the omens favor war.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Illyrio列出婚后行程：先成婚，再横越草原向Vaes Dothrak的dosh khaleen展示新娘，之后若战争征兆吉利才可能行动。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Illyrio列出Dothraki的完整时间表，说明Viserys无法命令这个新盟友，也不会在婚后立即得到军队。
blocks.background_zh: **习俗：** 婚后Drogo须在Vaes Dothrak将Daenerys展示给dosh khaleen；战争还取决于Dothraki认可的征兆。

blocks.original_text: Viserys seethed with impatience. “I piss on Dothraki omens. The Usurper sits on my father’s throne. How long must I wait?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Viserys蔑视Dothraki征兆，抱怨Usurper仍占据父亲的王位，自己已经等得太久。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段交代婚姻的军事交易与Dothraki时间表；Viserys以dragon自称，Daenerys却在梦中开始把dragon与他分开。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: Illyrio gave a massive shrug. “You have waited most of your life, great king. What is another few months, another few years?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Illyrio反问，Viserys几乎等了一生，再等数月或数年又有什么不同。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段交代婚姻的军事交易与Dothraki时间表；Viserys以dragon自称，Daenerys却在梦中开始把dragon与他分开。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: Ser Jorah, who had traveled as far east as Vaes Dothrak, nodded in agreement. “I counsel you to be patient, Your Grace. The Dothraki are true to their word, but they do things in their own time. A lesser man may beg a favor from the khal, but must never presume to berate him.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 去过Vaes Dothrak的Ser Jorah劝他耐心：Dothraki会守信，但按自己的时间行事；可以请求khal，不可呵斥。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段交代婚姻的军事交易与Dothraki时间表；Viserys以dragon自称，Daenerys却在梦中开始把dragon与他分开。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: Viserys bristled. “Guard your tongue, Mormont, or I’ll have it out. I am no lesser man, I am the rightful Lord of the Seven Kingdoms. The dragon does not beg.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Viserys因“较低等的人”一词发怒，威胁割掉Jorah的舌头，并宣称dragon不会乞求。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Viserys只回应“lesser man”造成的自尊伤害；“dragon不乞求”成为他拒绝现实规则的口号。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: Ser Jorah lowered his eyes respectfully. Illyrio smiled enigmatically and tore a wing from the duck. Honey and grease ran over his fingers and dripped down into his beard as he nibbled at the tender meat. There are no more dragons, Dany thought, staring at her brother, though she did not dare say it aloud.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah恭敬低眼，Illyrio含义不明地笑着进食；Daenerys在心中想世上已没有dragons，却不敢说出口。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys心中“没有dragons了”的反驳，比在场成年人更直接，却仍只能保持沉默。
blocks.background_zh: **文本事实：** 活着的dragons被普遍认为已经消失；这是Daenerys当时对Viserys自我神话的内心反驳。

blocks.original_text: Yet that night she dreamt of one. Viserys was hitting her, hurting her. She was naked, clumsy with fear. She ran from him, but her body seemed thick and ungainly. He struck her again. She stumbled and fell. “You woke the dragon,” he screamed as he kicked her. “You woke the dragon, you woke the dragon.” Her thighs were slick with blood. She closed her eyes and whimpered. As if in answer, there was a hideous ripping sound and the crackling of some great fire. When she looked again, Viserys was gone, great columns of flame rose all around, and in the midst of them was the dragon. It turned its great head slowly. When its molten eyes found hers, she woke, shaking and covered with a fine sheen of sweat. She had never been so afraid . . .
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys梦见Viserys再次施暴，但在痛苦、血与火中，一条dragon出现并取代了他；她在极度恐惧中惊醒。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 梦中Viserys反复声称自己是dragon，真正出现的dragon却取代了他，显示Daenerys的潜意识开始分离二者。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: . . . until the day of her wedding came at last.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys以为自己从未如此害怕，直到婚礼日真正来临。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 独立半句以省略号把噩梦恐惧直接缝合到婚礼现实，说明现实威胁比梦更近。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: The ceremony began at dawn and continued until dusk, an endless day of drinking and feasting and fighting. A mighty earthen ramp had been raised amid the grass palaces, and there Dany was seated beside Khal Drogo, above the seething sea of Dothraki. She had never seen so many people in one place, nor people so strange and frightening. The horselords might put on rich fabrics and sweet perfumes when they visited the Free Cities, but out under the open sky they kept the old ways. Men and women alike wore painted leather vests over bare chests and horsehair leggings cinched by bronze medallion belts, and the warriors greased their long braids with fat from the rendering pits. They gorged themselves on horseflesh roasted with honey and peppers, drank themselves blind on fermented mare’s milk and Illyrio’s fine wines, and spat jests at each other across the fires, their voices harsh and alien in Dany’s ears.
blocks.explanation_zh: 婚礼从黎明持续到黄昏，充满宴饮、歌舞与打斗；Daenerys与Drogo坐在高台，俯视坚持古老服饰、饮食和狂欢方式的Dothraki人海。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段用婚礼的感官过载、语言孤立和公共暴力累积Daenerys的恐惧，礼物环节则成为婚夜倒计时。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: Viserys was seated just below her, splendid in a new black wool tunic with a scarlet dragon on the chest. Illyrio and Ser Jorah sat beside him. Theirs was a place of high honor, just below the khal’s own bloodriders, but Dany could see the anger in her brother’s lilac eyes. He did not like sitting beneath her, and he fumed when the slaves offered each dish first to the khal and his bride, and served him from the portions they refused. He could do nothing but nurse his resentment, so nurse it he did, his mood growing blacker by the hour at each insult to his person.
blocks.explanation_zh: Viserys虽获高贵席位，却因坐在Daenerys下方、只能吃新人拒绝的食物而愤恨，只能不断品味自己的怨气。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Viserys形式上获得高席，却只感到低于妹妹和吃剩食的侮辱；“nurse resentment”把怨恨写成被主动喂养之物。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: Dany had never felt so alone as she did seated in the midst of that vast horde. Her brother had told her to smile, and so she smiled until her face ached and the tears came unbidden to her eyes. She did her best to hide them, knowing how angry Viserys would be if he saw her crying, terrified of how Khal Drogo might react. Food was brought to her, steaming joints of meat and thick black sausages and Dothraki blood pies, and later fruits and sweetgrass stews and delicate pastries from the kitchens of Pentos, but she waved it all away. Her stomach was a roil, and she knew she could keep none of it down.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys在人海中极度孤独；她按Viserys命令强笑到脸疼，不敢哭，也因紧张而无法进食。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 庞大人群没有削弱孤独，反因无人能交流而放大隔绝；“笑到流泪”使服从命令成为身体劳动。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: There was no one to talk to. Khal Drogo shouted commands and jests down to his bloodriders, and laughed at their replies, but he scarcely glanced at Dany beside him. They had no common language. Dothraki was incomprehensible to her, and the khal knew only a few words of the bastard Valyrian of the Free Cities, and none at all of the Common Tongue of the Seven Kingdoms. She would even have welcomed the conversation of Illyrio and her brother, but they were too far below to hear her.
blocks.explanation_zh: Drogo只与bloodriders谈笑，几乎不看Daenerys；两人没有共同语言，Illyrio和Viserys又坐得太远，她无人可谈。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 婚姻在仪式上联结二人，语言上却几乎完全分离；沟通障碍是本章后半的核心限制。
blocks.background_zh: **语言背景：** Daenerys不懂Dothraki；Drogo只懂少量bastard Valyrian，不懂Common Tongue。

blocks.original_text: So she sat in her wedding silks, nursing a cup of honeyed wine, afraid to eat, talking silently to herself. I am blood of the dragon, she told herself. I am Daenerys Stormborn, Princess of Dragonstone, of the blood and seed of Aegon the Conqueror.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys只能抱着蜂蜜酒在心中重复自己的血统和头衔，用Aegon the Conqueror后裔的身份给自己撑胆。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys把完整头衔当成内心护甲：它能给她勇气，却不能给她对话者或决定权。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: The sun was only a quarter of the way up the sky when she saw her first man die. Drums were beating as some of the women danced for the khal. Drogo watched without expression, but his eyes followed their movements, and from time to time he would toss down a bronze medallion for the women to fight over.
blocks.explanation_zh: 太阳刚升起不久，她便看到婚礼上的第一个死者；舞者在鼓声中表演，Drogo偶尔抛下铜章让她们争抢。
blocks.literary_note_zh: “第一个死者”在太阳初升时便出现，序数词已经暗示不会是最后一个。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: The warriors were watching too. One of them finally stepped into the circle, grabbed a dancer by the arm, pushed her down to the ground, and mounted her right there, as a stallion mounts a mare. Illyrio had told her that might happen. “The Dothraki mate like the animals in their herds. There is no privacy in a khalasar, and they do not understand sin or shame as we do.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 一名武士当众与舞者发生性接触；Illyrio曾解释，khalasar不把这类亲密行为视为私密或羞耻。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段用婚礼的感官过载、语言孤立和公共暴力累积Daenerys的恐惧，礼物环节则成为婚夜倒计时。
blocks.background_zh: **视角限制：** “Dothraki像畜群动物”的概括来自Illyrio，不应自动当成对每个个体的完整客观描述。

blocks.original_text: Dany looked away from the coupling, frightened when she realized what was happening, but a second warrior stepped forward, and a third, and soon there was no way to avert her eyes. Then two men seized the same woman. She heard a shout, saw a shove, and in the blink of an eye the arakhs were out, long razor-sharp blades, half sword and half scythe. A dance of death began as the warriors circled and slashed, leaping toward each other, whirling the blades around their heads, shrieking insults at each clash. No one made a move to interfere.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys试图移开视线，但更多武士加入后已无法回避；两人争夺同一女子，arakhs立刻出鞘，无人干预。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 叙事严格跟随Daenerys视线：她试图转头，人群和冲突又迫她观看；无人干预使暴力显得属于公共秩序。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: It ended as quickly as it began. The arakhs shivered together faster than Dany could follow, one man missed a step, the other swung his blade in a flat arc. Steel bit into flesh just above the Dothraki’s waist, and opened him from backbone to belly button, spilling his entrails into the dust. As the loser died, the winner took hold of the nearest woman— not even the one they had been quarreling over—and had her there and then. Slaves carried off the body, and the dancing resumed.
blocks.explanation_zh: 决斗迅速结束，一名武士被杀；胜者随即转向另一名女子，奴隶搬走尸体，舞蹈照常继续。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 死亡、搬尸与恢复舞蹈之间没有情绪间隔，这种迅速归于常态比决斗本身更突出文化距离。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: Magister Illyrio had warned Dany about this too. “A Dothraki wedding without at least three deaths is deemed a dull affair,” he had said. Her wedding must have been especially blessed; before the day was over, a dozen men had died.
blocks.explanation_zh: Illyrio曾说少于三人死亡的Dothraki婚礼会被视为乏味；这场婚礼最终死了十二人。
blocks.literary_note_zh: “especially blessed”是黑色反语；按婚礼习俗死亡多代表热闹，在Daenerys视角中却只加深恐怖。
blocks.background_zh: **文本事实：** Illyrio称少于三人死亡的婚礼会被视为乏味；本场婚礼死亡十二人。

blocks.original_text: As the hours passed, the terror grew in Dany, until it was all she could do not to scream. She was afraid of the Dothraki, whose ways seemed alien and monstrous, as if they were beasts in human skins and not true men at all. She was afraid of her brother, of what he might do if she failed him. Most of all, she was afraid of what would happen tonight under the stars, when her brother gave her up to the hulking giant who sat drinking beside her with a face as still and cruel as a bronze mask.
blocks.explanation_zh: 恐惧不断增长：Daenerys害怕陌生而暴力的Dothraki，害怕令Viserys失望，更害怕婚后与Drogo独处。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 恐惧由外到内排列：陌生群体、熟悉兄长、即将独处的丈夫；最后一项被放在情绪顶点。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: I am the blood of the dragon, she told herself again.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys再次以“我是dragon之血”压制恐惧。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段用婚礼的感官过载、语言孤立和公共暴力累积Daenerys的恐惧，礼物环节则成为婚夜倒计时。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: When at last the sun was low in the sky, Khal Drogo clapped his hands together, and the drums and the shouting and feasting came to a sudden halt. Drogo stood and pulled Dany to her feet beside him. It was time for her bride gifts.
blocks.explanation_zh: 黄昏时Drogo拍手，宴饮骤停；他拉起Daenerys，婚礼进入bride gifts环节。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段用婚礼的感官过载、语言孤立和公共暴力累积Daenerys的恐惧，礼物环节则成为婚夜倒计时。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: And after the gifts, she knew, after the sun had gone down, it would be time for the first ride and the consummation of her marriage. Dany tried to put the thought aside, but it would not leave her. She hugged herself to try to keep from shaking.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys知道礼物之后便是first ride与完婚，无法排除恐惧，只能抱紧自己抑制颤抖。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段用婚礼的感官过载、语言孤立和公共暴力累积Daenerys的恐惧，礼物环节则成为婚夜倒计时。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: Her brother Viserys gifted her with three handmaids. Dany knew they had cost him nothing; Illyrio no doubt had provided the girls. Irri and Jhiqui were copper-skinned Dothraki with black hair and almond-shaped eyes, Doreah a fair-haired, blue-eyed Lysene girl. “These are no common servants, sweet sister,” her brother told her as they were brought forward one by one. “Illyrio and I selected them personally for you. Irri will teach you riding, Jhiqui the Dothraki tongue, and Doreah will instruct you in the womanly arts of love.” He smiled thinly. “She’s very good, Illyrio and I can both swear to that.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Viserys送她三名handmaids，但费用其实来自Illyrio；Irri教骑术、Jhiqui教语言、Doreah教亲密知识，Viserys还以轻薄言辞谈论Doreah。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Viserys把三名女子当作自己挑选的礼物，Daenerys却立即识别经济来源；轻薄言辞也暴露这些女性在交易中的位置。
blocks.background_zh: **文本事实：** Irri、Jhiqui和Doreah分别负责骑术、Dothraki语与婚姻亲密知识。

blocks.original_text: Ser Jorah Mormont apologized for his gift. “It is a small thing, my princess, but all a poor exile could afford,” he said as he laid a small stack of old books before her. They were histories and songs of the Seven Kingdoms, she saw, written in the Common Tongue. She thanked him with all her heart.
blocks.explanation_zh: Ser Jorah因礼物不贵重而道歉，但他送的是Common Tongue写成的Seven Kingdoms历史与歌谣，Daenerys由衷感谢。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jorah称书是“小东西”，Daenerys却“全心”感谢；礼物的情感价值与市场价格明显分离。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: Magister Illyrio murmured a command, and four burly slaves hurried forward, bearing between them a great cedar chest bound in bronze. When she opened it, she found piles of the finest velvets and damasks the Free Cities could produce . . . and resting on top, nestled in the soft cloth, three huge eggs. Dany gasped. They were the most beautiful things she had ever seen, each different than the others, patterned in such rich colors that at first she thought they were crusted with jewels, and so large it took both of her hands to hold one. She lifted it delicately, expecting that it would be made of some fine porcelain or delicate enamel, or even blown glass, but it was much heavier than that, as if it were all of solid stone. The surface of the shell was covered with tiny scales, and as she turned the egg between her fingers, they shimmered like polished metal in the light of the setting sun. One egg was a deep green, with burnished bronze flecks that came and went depending on how Dany turned it. Another was pale cream streaked with gold. The last was black, as black as a midnight sea, yet alive with scarlet ripples and swirls. “What are they?” she asked, her voice hushed and full of wonder.
blocks.explanation_zh: Illyrio送来装满高级织物的雪松箱，箱中有三枚色彩各异、布满鳞片、像石头般沉重的巨蛋，Daenerys惊叹其美丽。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 龙蛋描写从珠宝、瓷器和玻璃的误认，逐步转向异常重量、鳞片与金属光泽，让读者与Daenerys同步辨认。
blocks.background_zh: **文本事实：** Illyrio送出三枚石化dragon’s eggs，声称来自Asshai之外的Shadow Lands。

blocks.original_text: “Dragon’s eggs, from the Shadow Lands beyond Asshai,” said Magister Illyrio. “The eons have turned them to stone, yet still they burn bright with beauty.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Illyrio说它们是来自Asshai之外Shadow Lands的dragon’s eggs，漫长岁月使其石化，但美丽仍在。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段以handmaids、书、龙蛋、武器和奢侈品展示不同赠礼者如何定义Daenerys的身份。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: “I shall treasure them always.” Dany had heard tales of such eggs, but she had never seen one, nor thought to see one. It was a truly magnificent gift, though she knew that Illyrio could afford to be lavish. He had collected a fortune in horses and slaves for his part in selling her to Khal Drogo.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys答应永远珍藏；她也明白Illyrio之所以能慷慨，是因为他已从这场婚姻中获得大量马匹和奴隶。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys在感到奇迹时仍记得Illyrio从“卖她”中获利，说明她没有被礼物的美完全迷惑。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: The khal’s bloodriders offered her the traditional three weapons, and splendid weapons they were. Haggo gave her a great leather whip with a silver handle, Cohollo a magnificent arakh chased in gold, and Qotho a double-curved dragonbone bow taller than she was. Magister Illyrio and Ser Jorah had taught her the traditional refusals for these offerings. “This is a gift worthy of a great warrior, O blood of my blood, and I am but a woman. Let my lord husband bear these in my stead.” And so Khal Drogo too received his “bride gifts.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Drogo的三名bloodriders按传统赠送长鞭、arakh与dragonbone弓；Daenerys依仪式以女性身份谢绝，让丈夫代为使用。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 传统拒辞要求Daenerys公开说“我只是女人”，将赠给她的军事力量转交丈夫；性别权力已写进仪式。
blocks.background_zh: **婚礼习俗：** bloodriders赠新娘三件武器，新娘按仪式谢绝并让丈夫代用。

blocks.original_text: Other gifts she was given in plenty by other Dothraki: slippers and jewels and silver rings for her hair, medallion belts and painted vests and soft furs, sandsilks and jars of scent, needles and feathers and tiny bottles of purple glass, and a gown made from the skin of a thousand mice. “A handsome gift, Khaleesi,” Magister Illyrio said of the last, after he had told her what it was. “Most lucky.” The gifts mounted up around her in great piles, more gifts than she could possibly imagine, more gifts than she could want or use.
blocks.explanation_zh: 其他Dothraki送来衣物、珠宝、香料等海量物品，甚至有千张鼠皮制成的长袍，礼物多到她无法使用。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段以handmaids、书、龙蛋、武器和奢侈品展示不同赠礼者如何定义Daenerys的身份。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: And last of all, Khal Drogo brought forth his own bride gift to her. An expectant hush rippled out from the center of the camp as he left her side, growing until it had swallowed the whole khalasar. When he returned, the dense press of Dothraki gift-givers parted before him, and he led the horse to her.
blocks.explanation_zh: 最后Drogo亲自取礼物，期待的寂静扩展到整个khalasar；人群分开，他牵来一匹马。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 寂静从中心向外波动，让Drogo的礼物在出现前便获得与众不同的重量。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: She was a young filly, spirited and splendid. Dany knew just enough about horses to know that this was no ordinary animal. There was something about her that took the breath away. She was grey as the winter sea, with a mane like silver smoke.
blocks.explanation_zh: 这是一匹年轻而非同寻常的母马，身体像冬日海水般灰，鬃毛像银色烟雾。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 银灰色与Daenerys的头发呼应，使马不像通用财物，而像按她个人特征识别的伙伴。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: Hesitantly she reached out and stroked the horse’s neck, ran her fingers through the silver of her mane. Khal Drogo said something in Dothraki and Magister Illyrio translated. “Silver for the silver of your hair, the khal says.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys犹豫地抚摸马颈和银鬃；Drogo说它的银色是为配她的银发。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段让银马成为第一件真正给Daenerys带来自由和行动权的礼物，跃火完成情绪转折。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: “She’s beautiful,” Dany murmured.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys轻声赞叹这匹马很美。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段让银马成为第一件真正给Daenerys带来自由和行动权的礼物，跃火完成情绪转折。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: “She is the pride of the khalasar, “ Illyrio said. “Custom decrees that the khaleesi must ride a mount worthy of her place by the side of the khal.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Illyrio说它是khalasar的骄傲，习俗要求khaleesi拥有与身份相配的坐骑。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段让银马成为第一件真正给Daenerys带来自由和行动权的礼物，跃火完成情绪转折。
blocks.background_zh: **术语：** khaleesi是khal的妻子与女性配偶头衔，需有与身份相配的坐骑。

blocks.original_text: Drogo stepped forward and put his hands on her waist. He lifted her up as easily as if she were a child and set her on the thin Dothraki saddle, so much smaller than the ones she was used to. Dany sat there uncertain for a moment. No one had told her about this part. “What should I do?” she asked Illyrio.
blocks.explanation_zh: Drogo轻松把Daenerys举上Dothraki马鞍；无人预告她要当众试骑，她不安地询问该怎么做。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 成人细致教她如何拒收武器，却没人预告公开试骑；对礼仪外表的准备与对她个人感受的忽略形成对照。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: It was Ser Jorah Mormont who answered. “Take the reins and ride. You need not go far.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Ser Jorah回答，只要拿住缰绳骑出去，不必走远。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段让银马成为第一件真正给Daenerys带来自由和行动权的礼物，跃火完成情绪转折。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: Nervously Dany gathered the reins in her hands and slid her feet into the short stirrups. She was only a fair rider; she had spent far more time traveling by ship and wagon and palanquin than by horseback. Praying that she would not fall off and disgrace herself, she gave the filly the lightest and most timid touch with her knees.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys骑术普通，过去更多乘船、车和palanquin；她祈祷别摔下丢脸，只敢轻轻催马。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段让银马成为第一件真正给Daenerys带来自由和行动权的礼物，跃火完成情绪转折。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: And for the first time in hours, she forgot to be afraid. Or perhaps it was for the first time ever.
blocks.explanation_zh: 这一刻Daenerys数小时来第一次忘记害怕，甚至可能是一生第一次。
blocks.literary_note_zh: “或许是一生第一次”把数小时的婚礼恐惧扩展到整个童年，暗示Viserys的统治一直以恐惧为基础。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: The silver-grey filly moved with a smooth and silken gait, and the crowd parted for her, every eye upon them. Dany found herself moving faster than she had intended, yet somehow it was exciting rather than terrifying. The horse broke into a trot, and she smiled. Dothraki scrambled to clear a path. The slightest pressure with her legs, the lightest touch on the reins, and the filly responded. She sent it into a gallop, and now the Dothraki were hooting and laughing and shouting at her as they jumped out of her way. As she turned to ride back, a firepit loomed ahead, directly in her path. They were hemmed in on either side, with no room to stop. A daring she had never known filled Daenerys then, and she gave the filly her head.
blocks.explanation_zh: 银灰母马对细微指令敏锐回应；Daenerys从快步到飞驰，以兴奋取代恐惧，面对火坑时放开缰绳。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 马对微小动作的即时回应给Daenerys罕见的控制感；她短暂从被安排者变成能发出指令的骑手。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: The silver horse leapt the flames as if she had wings.
blocks.explanation_zh: 银马像长出翅膀一样跃过火焰。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 极短独立句把跃火设为情绪高峰；“像有翅膀”把地面的逃离转成短暂飞翔。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: When she pulled up before Magister Illyrio, she said, “Tell Khal Drogo that he has given me the wind.” The fat Pentoshi stroked his yellow beard as he repeated her words in Dothraki, and Dany saw her new husband smile for the first time.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys让Illyrio告诉Drogo，他送给她的是风；Drogo听后第一次对她微笑。
blocks.literary_note_zh: “你送给我风”描述的是自由感而非价格或血统；Drogo首次微笑，表明他理解了这一回应。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: The last sliver of sun vanished behind the high walls of Pentos to the west just then. Dany had lost all track of time. Khal Drogo commanded his bloodriders to bring forth his own horse, a lean red stallion. As the khal was saddling the horse, Viserys slid close to Dany on her silver, dug his fingers into her leg, and said, “Please him, sweet sister, or I swear, you will see the dragon wake as it has never woken before.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 日落后Drogo准备婚后骑行；Viserys却靠近并用手掐她的腿，威胁她必须取悦Drogo，否则会“唤醒dragon”。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Viserys在Daenerys刚获得自由感时用触碰和熟悉威胁将她拉回控制关系。
blocks.background_zh: **文本事实：** Viserys长期以“唤醒dragon”威胁Daenerys，指自己即将施加的愤怒和暴力。

blocks.original_text: The fear came back to her then, with her brother’s words. She felt like a child once more, only thirteen and all alone, not ready for what was about to happen to her.
blocks.explanation_zh: Viserys的话使恐惧立刻回来；Daenerys再次觉得自己只是十三岁、孤立无援且没有准备好的孩子。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 文本明确Daenerys只有十三岁，要求读者不能被Princess、khaleesi和华丽婚礼忘记她是未成年人。
blocks.background_zh: **年龄与权力：** Daenerys明确只有十三岁，婚姻由成人安排为政治交易，这是后续场景不可忽略的结构性强迫背景。

blocks.original_text: They rode out together as the stars came out, leaving the khalasar and the grass palaces behind. Khal Drogo spoke no word to her, but drove his stallion at a hard trot through the gathering dusk. The tiny silver bells in his long braid rang softly as he rode. “I am the blood of the dragon,” she whispered aloud as she followed, trying to keep her courage up. “I am the blood of the dragon. I am the blood of the dragon.” The dragon was never afraid.
blocks.explanation_zh: 星辰升起时二人离开营地；Daenerys跟在沉默的Drogo身后，反复念“我是dragon之血”，试图维持勇气。
blocks.literary_note_zh: “dragon从不害怕”是Daenerys强加给自己的不可能标准；需要重复三次，恰好证明恐惧仍在。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: Afterward she could not say how far or how long they had ridden, but it was full dark when they stopped at a grassy place beside a small stream. Drogo swung off his horse and lifted her down from hers. She felt as fragile as glass in his hands, her limbs as weak as water. She stood there helpless and trembling in her wedding silks while he secured the horses, and when he turned to look at her, she began to cry.
blocks.explanation_zh: 他们在天黑后停在小溪旁；Daenerys感到像玻璃般易碎、四肢无力，终于在Drogo的注视下哭泣。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 玻璃、水、婚绸和眼泪共同把Daenerys写成失去支撑的身体，与白天骑马的行动自由形成反差。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: Khal Drogo stared at her tears, his face strangely empty of expression. “No,” he said. He lifted his hand and rubbed away the tears roughly with a callused thumb.
blocks.explanation_zh: Drogo看着她的眼泪，说了一个“No”，再用长满老茧的拇指略显粗糙地擦去泪水。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Drogo的第一个Common Tongue词是“No”，但它是制止、安慰还是否定，对Daenerys并不清楚。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: “You speak the Common Tongue,” Dany said in wonder.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys惊讶地以为Drogo会说Common Tongue。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段让Viserys的威胁打断骑行带来的勇气，随后用有限词汇、语气和合作动作建立Daenerys与Drogo的初步沟通。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: “No,” he said again.
blocks.explanation_zh: Drogo只再次重复“No”。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段让Viserys的威胁打断骑行带来的勇气，随后用有限词汇、语气和合作动作建立Daenerys与Drogo的初步沟通。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: Perhaps he had only that word, she thought, but it was one word more than she had known he had, and somehow it made her feel a little better. Drogo touched her hair lightly, sliding the silver-blond strands between his fingers and murmuring softly in Dothraki. Dany did not understand the words, yet there was warmth in the tone, a tenderness she had never expected from this man.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys猜他也许只会这一个词，但他的语气和轻触头发的动作带有她未曾预期的温暖，使她略微安心。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys无法理解词义，只能从语气辨认温暖；沟通从词汇转向声音、触摸与手势。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: He put his finger under her chin and lifted her head, so she was looking up into his eyes.
blocks.explanation_zh: Drogo托起Daenerys的下巴，让她与自己对视。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段让Viserys的威胁打断骑行带来的勇气，随后用有限词汇、语气和合作动作建立Daenerys与Drogo的初步沟通。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: Drogo towered over her as he towered over everyone. Taking her lightly under the arms, he lifted her and seated her on a rounded rock beside the stream. Then he sat on the ground facing her, legs crossed beneath him, their faces finally at a height. “No,” he said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Drogo把Daenerys放在溪边圆石上，自己盘腿坐在地上，使两人的脸处于同一高度，然后又说“No”。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Drogo通过坐低使二人脸部等高，但年龄、力量和婚姻决定权的不平等并未因此消失。
blocks.background_zh: **文本事实：** Drogo坐在地上使两人的脸等高；这不取消年龄、力量与婚姻决定权的不平等。

blocks.original_text: “Is that the only word you know?” she asked him.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys问他是否只会这一个词。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段让Viserys的威胁打断骑行带来的勇气，随后用有限词汇、语气和合作动作建立Daenerys与Drogo的初步沟通。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: Drogo did not reply. His long heavy braid was coiled in the dirt beside him. He pulled it over his right shoulder and began to remove the bells from his hair, one by one. After a moment Dany leaned forward to help. When they were done, Drogo gestured. She understood. Slowly, carefully, she began to undo his braid.
blocks.explanation_zh: Drogo没有回答，而是逐个解下辫中银铃；Daenerys主动帮忙，又按手势慢慢拆开他的辫子。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 解铃和拆辫是一项无需共同语言的合作任务；Daenerys从被动观察转为主动帮助。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: It took a long time. All the while he sat there silently, watching her. When she was done, he shook his head, and his hair spread out behind him like a river of darkness, oiled and gleaming. She had never seen hair so long, so black, so thick.
blocks.explanation_zh: 拆辫子用了很久；解开后，他油亮浓黑的长发像黑色河流般铺开。
blocks.literary_note_zh: “黑暗河流”将白天由铃铛和辫子表示的公开武士身份，转成私密场景中的自然形态。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: [原文涉及明确未成年角色的性内容，此处不逐字复录。请参见源 PDF p.104 中对应段落。]
blocks.explanation_zh: 随后Drogo开始帮Daenerys脱下婚服，场景进入婚姻亲密环节。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段进入婚姻亲密场景；精读只保留非露骨的叙事功能、局部问答与权力关系，不复录未成年角色的露骨细节。
blocks.background_zh: **安全说明：** 从本段起因涉及明确未成年角色的性内容，不逐字复录原文；稳定编号和PDF定位仍保留。

blocks.original_text: [原文涉及明确未成年角色的性内容，此处不逐字复录。请参见源 PDF p.104 中对应段落。]
blocks.explanation_zh: Drogo动作比她预想的轻柔；她因羞怯回避目光、遮挡身体，他则以“No”和动作让她继续看着自己。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 文本同时写Drogo动作轻柔与Daenerys的不动、避视和遮挡；不能用一个形容词替整场权力关系辩护。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: [原文涉及明确未成年角色的性内容，此处不逐字复录。请参见源 PDF p.104 中对应段落。]
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys重复Drogo的“No”，开始在极有限的共同词汇中回应。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys首次主动说出两人唯一的共同词，但此时只是回声，并非对整场政治婚姻的自由选择。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: [原文涉及明确未成年角色的性内容，此处不逐字复录。请参见源 PDF p.104 中对应段落。]
blocks.explanation_zh: Drogo继续完成亲密行为前的准备；Daenerys因寒冷和恐惧发抖，他暂时只是安静观察。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段进入婚姻亲密场景；精读只保留非露骨的叙事功能、局部问答与权力关系，不复录未成年角色的露骨细节。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: [原文涉及明确未成年角色的性内容，此处不逐字复录。请参见源 PDF p.104 中对应段落。]
blocks.explanation_zh: Drogo以缓慢、循序的身体接触使Daenerys逐渐放松；文本强调其力量强大，却没有在此刻令她疼痛。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段以力量与没有造成疼痛作对照，改变她对即时暴力的预期；年龄与婚姻非自主性仍不可忽略。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: [原文涉及明确未成年角色的性内容，此处不逐字复录。请参见源 PDF p.104 中对应段落。]
blocks.explanation_zh: 亲密接触继续加深，Daenerys逐渐出现身体反应；此处不复录涉及未成年角色的露骨细节。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段通过时间拉长和身体反应表现恐惧逐渐转为参与；因角色明确未成年，不重述露骨细节。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。

blocks.original_text: [原文涉及明确未成年角色的性内容，此处不逐字复录。请参见源 PDF p.105 中对应段落。]
blocks.explanation_zh: Drogo停下并把“No”说成问句，Daenerys理解他在寻求她对继续亲密行为的回应。
blocks.literary_note_zh: “No?”把反复出现的单词转成问句，形式上索取回应；局部交流不能倒推出她曾自由选择整场婚姻。
blocks.background_zh: **阅读区分：** 当下问句寻求Daenerys回应，与她从未自由选择是否进入政治婚姻，是两个层次的事实。

blocks.original_text: [原文涉及明确未成年角色的性内容，此处不逐字复录。请参见源 PDF p.105 中对应段落。]
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys以“Yes”和主动动作表达愿意继续；此处仅保留叙事功能与同意结构，不复录露骨细节。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 结尾以“Yes”回应“No?”，让语言障碍在最小问答中暂时打开；仍须区分局部回应和结构性强迫。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观设定；重点在Daenerys的恐惧、Viserys的控制、Dothraki婚礼习俗或礼物的象征功能。
